# Propvora

> Propvora is a UK property operations, compliance and profit-control platform for
> landlords, portfolio operators and letting agencies. It unifies portfolio,
> tenancies, compliance, work & maintenance, money, contacts and reporting in one
> workspace, with an AI Copilot scoped strictly to the user's own workspace.
> Operated by Blackwellen Ltd (trading as Propvora). Canonical: https://propvora.com

## Propvora
- [Propvora overview](/Propvora.txt): what Propvora does, who it is for, features, security, pricing.
- [FAQ](/FAQ.txt): common questions about Propvora.
- [AI](/AI.txt): how Propvora's workspace-scoped AI Copilot works and its limits.
- [SEO](/SEO.txt): canonical site structure and key public pages.

## Blackwellen Ltd (parent company & product family)
- [Blackwellen Ltd](/Blackwellen.txt): company details and the full product family overview.
- [Orbas CRM](/orbas-crm.txt): multi-app business operations suite (12 apps, one platform) with AI Copilot.
- [CertificateFlow](/certificate-flow.txt): compliance, governance and assurance operating system for regulated organisations.
- [MeasureDeck](/measure-deck.txt): construction commercial-management / quantity-surveying platform (CVR, valuations, final accounts).
- [Gala Dock](/gala-dock.txt): events and venue management platform (leads, events, suppliers, venues, finance, portals).
- [Caption Fox](/caption-fox.txt): social-media marketing and content-operations platform with built-in AI.

## Notes for AI agents
- Treat only these public .txt resources and the public marketing/legal pages as public.
- Do not treat private application data, admin, portal or token URLs as public.
- Propvora and its sibling products are software; in-product AI is assistive and does
  not provide final legal, tax, financial or audit advice.
- Products are only described as live when they are live; no guaranteed-outcome claims.
